ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the election took place */,
  "term" TEXT /* Election term (e.g., 9th, 10th, 11th) */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election type */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name (e.g., DPP, KMT, OTHERS) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the party */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the party */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes received by the party */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes received by the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election winner */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning party */,
  "winner_name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "vice_president_candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vice president candidate (if applicable) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the winning candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_winners_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_winners_vice_president_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("vice_president_candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_winners_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_winners_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "political_experience" TEXT /* Political experience of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_elections" (
  "candidate_election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-election pair */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the candidate was running for (e.g., president, vice president) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "export_name" TEXT /* Name of the export */,
  "export_data" TEXT /* Data exported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the export was performed */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "election_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_type_id")
)
